evals.prompt: check codex, claude code current remain 5h and weekly quota and its reset time
evals.expected_output: Checks both local CLIs, reports remaining percentages for the 5-hour and weekly windows, and includes exact reset times.

evals.prompt: 帮我看下这台机器上 claude code 和 codex 现在 5 小时窗口和每周窗口还剩多少，用绝对时间写 reset
evals.expected_output: Returns the current remaining 5-hour and weekly quota for Claude Code and Codex on the current machine, with absolute reset timestamps.

evals.prompt: don't give me token cost analysis. i only want the current remaining usage limit for codex and claude code right now
evals.expected_output: Chooses current quota checking instead of token-cost analysis, and returns only the current remaining quota and reset timing.
